name: Scottish Oatcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the oats, flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut in the shortening until the mixture forms crumbly crumbs.
3. Gradually sprinkle the mixture with cold water, tossing with a fork to form a sticky dough.
4. Gather the dough into a ball and divide it into two halves.
5. On a well-floured pastry cloth or board, roll out each half into 12-by-9 inch rectangles using a floured rolling pin.
6. Cut the rectangles into 3-inch squares, then cut each square in half diagonally.
7. Place the oatcake pieces on greased or parchment paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes, or until the oatcakes are golden brown on the bottom.
9. Transfer the oatcakes to wire racks to cool. Serve warm with butter.
